mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_pay_log( order_type, order_id, user_id, out_trade_no, wx_transaction_no, wx_result, total_fee, status, created_at ) VALUE ( #{data.orderType}, #{data.orderId}, #{data.userId}, #{data.outTradeNo}, #{data.wxTransactionNo}, #{data.wxResult}, #{data.totalFee}, #{data.status}, #{data.createTime} )
